feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Datasphere
feed.subtitle: SAP Datasphere Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP Datasphere - SQL Views as SQL Script – Automatic generation of columns in the left side pane
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I am working with SQL Views using SQLScript (Table Function) in SAP Datasphere and noticed that the output columns must always be created manually in the Model Properties → Columns section before the SQLScript can be validated or deployed.

Even when the SQLScript contains a simple RETURN SELECT ... statement, Datasphere does not automatically generate the column definitions based on the SQL result. As far as I can see, this is different from standard SQL views, where column inference works automatically.

My questions:

  1. Is there any way to automatically generate the output columns in the left side panel when using SQLScript (Table Function) in SAP Datasphere?
  2. If not:
    • Is this a current technical limitation?
    • Is there any roadmap indicating that automatic column generation will be supported in the future?

Context / What I tried:

  • SQLScript with RETURN SELECT ...
  • SQLScript with table variables
  • Validation to trigger auto‑generation
  • Switching between SQL Standard and SQLScript

In all cases, Datasphere requires me to manually maintain the business/technical names and data types in the Model Properties panel before validation succeeds.

Example SQLScript:

return

with "cte_customers" as (
    select
        "id",
        "name"
    from "customers"
)

, "cte_customers_ranked" as (
    select
        "id",
        "name",
        1 as "rank_number"
    from "cte_customers"
)

select
    "id",
    "name",
    "rank_number"
from "cte_customers_ranked";

Expected behavior (wish):

Some way to auto‑populate the column list based on the SQLScript output (similar to SQL Standard views).

Actual behavior:

Columns must be fully defined manually, otherwise validation fails.

If anyone has additional insight, workaround ideas, or official SAP statements regarding this behavior, I would really appreciate it.

Thank you.

Kind regards,
Anna

 

Clicking Validate for the following statement automatically generates the column ID:
tab =
select
    "id" AS ID
from "customers";

return
select ID from :tab;

 

Clicking Validate for the following statement does not automatically generate the column ID:
tab = with "cte1" (ID) as (
    select
        "id" AS ID
    from "customers"
)
select ID from "cte1";

return
select ID from :tab;

 

Is there an issue with the WITH clause?

entry.title: Minimum CU for Datasphere with BDC Connector?
entry.content:
Hello Community,

We are currently evaluating the architecture for performing zero-copy data sharing from SAP Data Products to Databricks using the SAP BDC Connector.

According to my understanding, when using the BDC Connector for zero-copy data sharing, an SAP Datasphere tenant is still required. I would like to confirm whether the minimum Capacity Units (CU) required for Datasphere in this scenario follows the same logic described in the following blog post, which explains the minimum CU needed to activate the Object Store:

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blog-posts-by-sap/what-is-the-minimum-capacity-units-cu-to-activate-object-store-in-sap/ba-p/14181475

When performing zero-copy sharing of SAP Data Products to Databricks via the SAP BDC Connector, is the minimum CU requirement for Datasphere simply the minimum CU needed to activate the Object Store, as described in the blog above?

Thank you!

entry.title: Extract a measure depending on a max measure
entry.content:
I have datas built this way.

I want to create an other measure that extracts the measure "tempo lordo lavorato" where the measure "qta colli" is maximum, aggregating on "centro di lavoro" and "codice materiale".

For example in this case the max "qta colli" for centro =M155 and "codice materiale" = 150.IG074.01 the new measure will be 330.

for the combination "centro" = M155 and "codice materiale" = 1C2P.F0424014 is 480.

The report will be interrogated filtering the period od analysis.
_________________________________________________________
These are the data and the problem of the partition is that the value is calculated day by day. For example If the users analyses this period It should obtain 397

For the quantity I can make a formula in the analytical model this way:

With Exception Aggregation dimensions: WORKCENTER – MATERIAL – ID_RILEVAZIONE

 

And I obtain by "BEST" (for the days selected)

but I'm wondering how I can obtain the related value 397.

entry.title: BW Modernization - Shift Infoproviders from BW PCE to DSP
entry.content: What will happen with shifted Infoproviders as Local Table Files to DSP after shutting down BW PCE?

entry.title: Replication Flow not being selected as Analytic model Dependency
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I was creating a new package for an analytic model and I noticed that neither the replication flows that replicate the tables being used in the pipeline nor the task chain that execute those RF are being selected as dependencies of that analytic model. 

Why is this happening?

It happens with every asset?

How can I achieve this?

Thank you.

entry.title: Read data from EC_PCA_3
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

we are trying to read data from the extractor EC_PCA_3 but every time we have an error saying that the field DABRZ cannot be empty. To be honest the he's right because the field is empty in the GLPCA table.

The problem is that we have SAP R3 and we are limited on what we can do and if we try to load directly the table GLPCA we get an error because it's too big.

We wanted to use an extractor to use the delta load and improve the performance.

Do you have any suggestion?

entry.title: Connection Between S/4HANA ON PREM and Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi SAP Gurus,

We are facing an error like below screenshot while trying to connect between  S/4HANA on prem and Datasphere.

 

Our current S/4HANA version is 1709 and we don't plan to upgrade it in the near future.  

Do you have any suggestions for this issue?

 

BR,

Ege

entry.title: Custom Data Product
entry.content:
Hi, Can I create a custom data product on top of a view that was created in a customer-managed space with storage type “SAP HANA Database (Disk and In‑Memory)”? When I try to create a data product, the system only shows spaces that use object storage. Why is this happening?
 

SAP Business Data Cloud SAP Datasphere

entry.title: Is any CDS View available in S4 PCE which is compatible with 0UC_SALES_STATS_02 data source
entry.content:
Hi All,

Is any CDS View available in S4HANA PCE,, which is got same structure as  0UC_SALES_STATS_02 data source for SAP DataSphere? 

 

Thanks,

Raj

entry.title: Programmatically retrieving lineage/source object info for Analytical Models in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to understand whether it is possible to programmatically retrieve lineage metadata for an Analytical Model in SAP Datasphere.

Use case:
Within the Datasphere UI, the Impact & Lineage view allows us to trace a field from an Analytical Model back to its underlying objects (views and source tables). I am currently developing a small web application intended to List AMs automatically along with few technical details(for example: fields, and their originating tables/views).

Using the Consumption OData API, I am already able to extract the list of fields of an Analytical Model:

GET https://<tenant_url>/api/v1/datasphere/consumption/analytical/<space_id>/<asset_id>/$metadata

This provides the semantic fields exposed by the model.


However, my requirement is to enrich this information with the technical source information, specifically:

Analytical Model Field → Datasphere View Column → Underlying Table (or Remote Table)

Example:

I would like to know:

  1. Is there a REST API available to retrieve lineage information similar to what is shown in the Datasphere Impact & Lineage diagram?

  2. If not, are there any supported system metadata tables/views (for example via SQL access to the space) that can be used to obtain this mapping?

Any guidance or recommended approach would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you!

SAP Datasphere API

entry.title: Unable to filter by a temporal ATTR in a DataSphere's AM
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

Has anyone experienced issues when filtering by an employee’s temporal attribute in an Analytical Model in Datasphere?

The issue occurs regardless of whether a reference date is used. It seems that the Analytical Model first applies the reference date filter and then the prompt filter, which prevents me from adding Year and Month prompts.

Has anyone faced a similar behavior or found a workaround?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Datashpere Local Table "insufficient privilege"
entry.content:
Hello,

We have created from the database explorer, with a specific database user a table. The data in that table is added by a Integration Suite process, working fine.

I created a DS table definition refering this HANA table (but in the DS DB)

When trying to read that data there is no problem, but now a would like to move that table to a newer space, just followed the same process but we wanted to copy the data from the old table to the new, just with a share from the old space to the new and a data flow.

But, I'm getting this error

DBS-070407: |Loader LoadMapper_ceadfe63-ecac-4390-9fec-e5e58fd49640_target1_1TL_OneS_EXCHANGERATES SQL submitted to database <> resulted in error <General error;258 insufficient privilege: Detailed info for this error can be found with guid '8378B4CB2A342A41BE3EDE38A5675F38'>. The SQL submitted is <TRUNCATE TABLE "ODS_PRD"."1TL_OneS_EXCHANGERATES" >. RUN-051005: |Loader LoadMapper_ceadfe63-ecac-4390-9fec-e5e58fd49640_target1_1TL_OneS_EXCHANGERATES Execution of <Clean Table Before Load> for target <1TL_OneS_EXCHANGERATES> failed. Possible causes: (1) Error in the SQL syntax; (2) Database connection is broken; (3) Database related errors such as transaction log is full, etc.; (4) The user defined in the datastore has insufficient privileges to execute the SQL. If the error is for preload or postload operation, or if it is for regular load operation and load triggers are defined, check the SQL. Otherwise, for (3) and (4), contact your local DBA.DBS-070407: |Loader LoadMapper_ceadfe63-ecac-4390-9fec-e5e58fd49640_target1_1TL_OneS_EXCHANGERATES SQL submitted to database <> resulted in error <General error;258 insufficient privilege: Detailed info for this error can be found with guid '8378B4CB2A342A41BE3EDE38A5675F38'>. The SQL submitted is <TRUNCATE TABLE "ODS_PRD"."1TL_OneS_EXCHANGERATES" >.|<Clean Table Before Load>|<1TL_OneS_EXCHANGERATES>

 

So it seems that the normal DS user does not have enought priviliges on that table, but how could I set this and where should I set this.

entry.title: Install SAP Managed Data Products in BDC
entry.content:
Hi,

We’ve installed the SAP-managed Sales Order data product and configured the target space as our Datasphere local space Z_BDC, using “Replication Flow to Local Tables”. As a result:

  • A new space DS110 (SAP Managed Space) was created automatically.
  • DS110 contains the data product’s tables and is shared into our Z_BDC space.
  • We noticed that DS110 uses storage type as SAP HANA Database (Disk and In-Memory) storage🤔🤔

Questions

  • Can we enable Delta Sharing from DS110 (the SAP‑managed space), given that it uses HANA Disk and Memory as its storage types?
  • Is the SAP‑managed space that uses object file storage with a medallion architecture visible or accessible to customers?

#SAP BDC SAP Datasphere #Deltasharing #Data Products

 

@jeet_kapase @bjoern_friedmann

entry.title: Standard Exchange Rates (CDS) fails when executing the Data Flow in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I have installed and deployed the Currency Conversion Views into my Datasphere Dev Tenant space.

When i execute the standard Data Flow , the standard SAP.CURRENCY.DATAFLOW.TCURR flow fails with below error . 

Graph failure: target1 failed with the following error: Communication with DS backend was unexpectedly closed DBS-070401: Dataflow DF_cd87c0cbaf9f4ec4a54c4d8954b0d9ea_1|DT__1f96ad9674818_1_308 ODBC data source <97030a11-77ef-4d9f-af1d-9588c9d5ec3f.hana.prod-in30.hanacloud.ondemand.com> error message for operation <SQLExecute>: <[SAP AG][LIBODBCHDB SO][HDBODBC] General error;287 cannot insert NULL or update to NULL: Not nullable "GDATU" column>. ; group=default, message=Graph failure: target1 failed with the following error: Communication with DS backend was unexpectedly closed DBS-070401: Dataflow DF_cd87c0cbaf9f4ec4a54c4d8954b0d9ea_1|DT__1f96ad9674818_1_308 ODBC data source <97030a11-77ef-4d9f-af1d-9588c9d5ec3f.hana.prod-in30.hanacloud.ondemand.com> error message for operation <SQLExecute>: <[SAP AG][LIBODBCHDB SO][HDBODBC] General error;287 cannot insert NULL or update to NULL: Not nullable "GDATU" column>."

 

Have attached the error screenshot.

Can someone throw some light on this issues.

entry.title: Issue Filtering Empty Fields in OData Analytical Model Calls
entry.content:
Hello,

Over the past few weeks, we have been experiencing issues with OData calls to analytical models when applying filters on empty fields.

We are building the filter, for example, as follows:
ZOFFICE ne ' '

Until recently, this expression worked correctly. However, it is no longer excluding records with empty values (' '). Instead, it returns the full result set, including those records where the field is empty.

Has there been any recent change in how empty values are interpreted or handled in OData filters? We have also tried alternatives such as using null or comparison operators like gt, but none of them have produced the expected behavior.

Thank you,
Jaume

entry.title: Is it possible to query dimension and measure metadata in Datasphere?
entry.content:
Hello, Everyone 

Is there a way to query metadata on measures and dimensions in SAP datasphere? Specifically the business/technical names of the measures and dimensions, and what view they belong to. 

Right now i'm extracting this data into snowflake through the OData relational API, just to reimport it back into datasphere. It seems stupid to extract data from datasphere just to import back into the same system. 
 

link to the API i referred to:
SAP Datasphere: Analytical and Relational OData AP... - SAP Community

entry.title: RealTime replication IFICOMPANYCODE
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm looking for a way to do a RealTime replication of IFICOMPANYCODE (based on a remote table).

But, as stated in the documentation, this is not supported on ABAP tables. Not being an expert in SAP tables I'm running out of ideas.

How can I find a CDS view that has CDC capabilities based on this ABAP definition, because the IFICOMPANYCODE is already a join of multiple other tables.

 

KR, Harry

entry.title: In Datasphere Analytic Model, can I have two structures -- one in rows and one in columns?
entry.content:
In Datasphere, I want to build an Analytic Model with two structures -- one in rows and one in columns.   This can be done in SAP BW, but is it possible in Datasphere.

In rows, I will have a restricted key figures based on a key figure (measure) and specific non-date related dimension values and calculated key figures that have formulas based on the restricted key figures given on the rows.

In columns,  I will have a restricted key figures based on specific date related dimension values (current fiscal year, previous fiscal years, etc.) and calculated key figures that have formulas based on the restricted key figures given on the columns.

Is this possible?

Thanks.

Regards,

Mel Calucin

entry.title: Delta Load from One Datasphere Space to Another (Data Lake Type) – Data Not Overwriting Properly
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am facing an issue with delta loads across SAP Datasphere spaces and would appreciate your guidance.

Scenario Overview

Step 1: BW Bridge Space → Space A

  • We are performing delta data loads from a view in BW Bridge space to a local table in Datasphere Space A using a Transformation Flow.

  • The BW Bridge view is shared with Space A.

  • The local table in Space A is delta-enabled.

  • Load type used: Initial and Delta.

✅ Result:

  • Delta loads are running successfully.

  • Data in Space A matches the data in BW Bridge space

 

Step 2: Space A → Space B (Data Lake Type)

  • The delta-enabled local table in Space A is shared with Space B.

  • Space B is of type Data Lake.

  • A Transformation Flow is created in Space B to load delta data from the shared table (Space A) into a delta-enabled local table in Space B.

  • Load type used: Initial and Delta.

⚠️ Issue:

  • Delta loads are running without errors.

  • The number of delta records loaded from:

    • BW Bridge → Space A

    • Space A → Space B
      are the same.

  • However, data in Space B is not matching Space A.

  • Records are not overwriting properly in Space B.

  • Data is not in sync.

 

Troubleshooting Already Attempted

  • Executed Merge after data load in Space B.

  • Performed table optimization steps in Space B.

  • Issue still persists.

 

Question

Am I doing anything wrong while implementing delta loads from one Datasphere space to another, especially when the target space is of type Data Lake?

Is there any specific consideration for:

  • Delta handling behavior in Data Lake spaces?

  • Primary key / semantic key handling?

  • Overwrite vs append behavior?

  • Merge requirements in Data Lake tables?

  • Delta propagation limitations across spaces?

Any guidance or best practices for this scenario would be greatly appreciated

entry.title: SAP Datasphere - While Selective Deletion in table and Restricted Variable in Analytics Model
entry.content:
Hi guys,

While working with Analytic Model I faced this issue, I've one Manual Input Restricted Variable with filter type: - Interval used in one of Restricted Measure, and I've one column "Product_ID"  it consist P1 to P21 product.

when I preview my data and set my value to P14 to P20, then in output I'm having P2 also which shouldn't be in this range, initially I thought it is a bug or glitch.

Input: - 

Output: -

But when i tried selective deletion in table ( Delete Filtered Records ). then I got somewhat similar output, I've 2 column ID and Name and ID when I try to delete record from 1-5 then filtered record should be ( 1, 2, 3, 4, 5 ) but instead I'm getting ( 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 11 )

Data in table: - 

Input for data filter: -

output:- 

acording to this filter the data is not fetched properly so im sure this is bug/glitch 

is anyone else have faced this issue.???

Let me know if there is smtg else or this bug arrives in this quarterly update.
